# REGIME READ — 2026-06-24

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 3 → 4 (DEMOTED).** **Bearish trigger FIRED — multiple, same session:** (a) **VXN through 30: FIRED** (27.67 → 32.37, **+16.99% Jun 23**); (b) **Nasdaq Composite close at -5% from 52W high: FIRED** (now -5.9% from 52W high $27,190.21); (c) **NDX -3.29% Jun 23 confirms Nasdaq-led breakdown.** Stage 3 lasted exactly 1 trading day. The "coordinated repositioning Monday tape" flagged Jun 23 has converted to a confirmed Nasdaq-specific risk-off event Jun 23 close.
- **Total score: -1 → -4 (delta -3).** Dealer-flow -1 → -2 (VXN blew through 30 trigger, 32.37 vs 30 threshold); Breadth 0 → -1 (Nasdaq Comp -5.9% from 52W high triggers explicit lens degrade; NDX -4.6%; mega-cap selloff confirmed); Sentiment -1 → 0 (VIX 18.95 actually eased -2.77% — broad fear NOT confirming Nasdaq stress, a tactical relief signal); other lenses held.
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bearish — VIX daily close above 22:** **NOT FIRED** (18.95, eased back). VIX is the conspicuous non-confirmer.
  - **Bearish — VXN re-spike above 30:** **FIRED** (32.37, +16.99% Jun 23).
  - **Bearish — Nasdaq Composite close at -5% from 52W high:** **FIRED** (now -5.9%).
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 50DMA $76.39:** **LIKELY FIRED** on Jun 23 — NDX -3.29% implies TQQQ ~-9.9% on 3× leverage → est. close ~$73.9, below 50DMA.
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT FIRED** (no fresh print — credit remains the conspicuous missing data point).
  - **Bearish — Hot PCE Jun 26:** **ARMED — 2 sessions out.**
  - **Bullish — TQQQ daily close above $85:** **CLEARED-NEGATIVE.** Moved decisively away.
  - **Bullish — VIX below 18 for 2+ sessions:** **CLEARED-NEGATIVE** (18.95, above threshold).
  - **Bullish — VXN sub-25:** **CLEARED-NEGATIVE** (32.37, 7.4 pts away from trigger — worst in 3 sessions).
- **Notable lens flips:** Dealer-flow -1 → -2 (-1 swing) | Breadth 0 → -1 | Sentiment -1 → 0 (tactical, VIX-divergence). **VIX/VXN spread is the dominant new signal: VIX 18.95 vs VXN 32.37 = 13.4 pt spread = Nasdaq-isolated stress, not broad risk-off.**

> **Snapshot freshness:** Equity indices + VXN = Jun 23 close. VIX/DXY/Brent/Gold = Jun 24 intraday. 10Y = Jun 18 stale.
>
> **Headline divergence — VIX vs VXN:** VIX -2.77% to 18.95 (eased) while VXN +16.99% to 32.37 (blew through 30). The 13.4-pt spread between Nasdaq vol and S&P vol is the single most informative number on the page. This is Nasdaq-isolated stress (mega-cap tech repricing) without a broad-market panic confirmation. The asymmetry says: dealers are aggressively hedging Nasdaq, but cross-asset broad fear hasn't yet generalized.
>
> **DXY new reading:** 101.64 (+0.23%) is **within 0.07 of 52W high $101.71** — dollar bid has continued, now functionally at new 52W high. The macro dollar headwind hasn't paused; it's intensified.
>
> **Brent reading:** $74.70 (-3.09% Jun 24, -40.8% from 52W high) — Brent extends to new range lows. Iran-relief release is exhausted; oil is now a passive cross-asset risk-off feed (cheap oil = decent for SPX but irrelevant offset to Nasdaq tech stress).
>
> **Gold reading:** $4,061.90 (-1.65% Jun 24, -27.3% from 52W high) — Gold continues to bleed from peak-fear levels. Notably, Gold is NOT bid into PCE despite VXN spike — this confirms the stress is sector-specific (tech) not regime-wide (cross-asset).

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 4 — Regime-change (DEMOTED from Stage 3).** Stage 4 thesis: VIX 20-30 rising, breadth deteriorating. VIX 18.95 is below the 20 floor but VXN 32.37 is solidly inside Stage-4 vol band; breadth is decisively deteriorating (Nasdaq -5.9% from 52W high). Stage 4 entry is supported by Nasdaq-specific breakdown — VIX lagging is a feature (sector-isolated stress), not a disqualifier.
- **Stage Anchor:** Jun 23, 2026 — VXN re-spike through 30 + Nasdaq Comp through -5% from 52W high. **Day 1 of Stage 4.**
- **Position:** Stage 4 Day 1, **PCE Jun 26 is 2 sessions out** and now the binding decider for whether Stage 4 consolidates (vol-event run-up that crushes on print) or accelerates (Stage 5 entry).
- **Confidence: Medium-High.** Demotion supported by 2 explicit bearish-trigger fires + 4-lens net deterioration. The conspicuous non-confirmation (VIX easing, DJI -0.09% flat, RUT -0.96% modest) keeps confidence below High — broad market hasn't fully synced to the Nasdaq-isolated stress yet. Two sessions to PCE means path bifurcates sharply: benign PCE → VIX-crush relief, Stage 4 to Stage 3 reclaim attempt; hot PCE → broad confirmation, Stage 5 entry.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 3 reclaim):** Benign PCE Jun 26 (core in-line/cool + dovish reaction) AND VXN close below 28 AND Nasdaq Comp reclaim above -4% from 52W high AND VIX hold below 18.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 5):** VIX daily close above 22 (currently 18.95, threshold 3.05 pts away — closing the spread would confirm broad fear), OR VXN through 34 (52W high), OR hot PCE Jun 26 (core PCE > 3.0% YoY or hawkish reaction), OR Nasdaq Comp close at -7% from 52W high (~$25,287, ~1.2% further down), OR HY OAS through 300 bp, OR concurrent VIX above 22 + Nasdaq -7%+ from 52W high (Stage 5 entry condition).

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **demotes to Stage 4 regime-change on Nasdaq-isolated repricing event Jun 23** — VXN through 30 trigger fires (+16.99% session), Nasdaq Composite breaks -5% from 52W high, NDX -3.29% mega-cap-led selloff, dollar pushes 52W high — with VIX still lagging at 18.95 and PCE Jun 26 (2 sessions out) the binding bifurcation point between Stage-3 reclaim attempt and Stage-5 entry. Medium-high confidence.

Term structure likely steeply inverted at the Nasdaq vol surface |

## Diverging Signals
- **VIX 18.95 vs VXN 32.37 (13.4-pt spread) is the dominant tactical signal.** Historical reference: VIX/VXN spreads above 10 pts typically resolve within 5-10 sessions either way — Nasdaq vol converges down (constructive for tech) OR S&P vol converges up (broad regime confirms). The convergence direction is PCE-dependent: benign PCE → VXN crushes back toward VIX (Nasdaq vol exhales); hot PCE → VIX climbs to meet VXN (broad regime confirms Stage 4-5).
- **DJI -0.09% vs Nasdaq Comp -2.21% on the same session** confirms Jun 22's defensive rotation has accelerated, not unwound. DJI is functioning as the "anti-Nasdaq" safe haven in this regime — outflows from mega-cap tech rotating into industrial/financial mix.
- **Gold -1.65% Jun 24 while VXN spikes +16.99% Jun 23** is the conspicuous cross-asset non-confirmation. If this were a generalized risk-off event, Gold would be bid. Gold NOT bid means the market is treating this as Nasdaq-specific (and PCE-positioning-driven), not regime-wide.
- **DXY pushing 52W high while Brent extends lows** is classic late-cycle dollar liquidity squeeze — dollar wrecking-ball intact, oil release exhausted. Macro lens hardening even as the cross-asset basket nets neutral.
- **Geopolitical lens +2 is now the only meaningful offset to a -7-sum-of-bearish-lenses backdrop.** Single-point-of-failure for the regime read. Any MOU complication, tariff headline, or fresh Iran chatter triggers immediate Stage-5 entry without further deterioration in vol/breadth.

Path-risk into PCE Jun 26 is now elevated symmetrically (large vol-of-vol) but bias is asymmetric down.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~42-48 — decisive break from neutral-high to neutral-low. Not oversold, but a -9.9% session puts momentum decisively in retreat. The Jun 22-23 sequence has been a momentum regime change, not noise.
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS still holds technically but is one session from DOWNTURN trigger.** Est. -16.1% from 4-wk high $88.09 (vs -6.9% Jun 22 — major deterioration in 1 session); +8.5% above 4-wk low $68.08 (vs +20.4% Jun 22 — cushion crushed). **DOWNTURN threshold (4-wk high × 0.80 = $70.47) is now 4.6% below spot — one ~-5% session (smaller than today's -9.9% move) flips the structural label.** EM lower bound $63.8 sits 7.0% below 4-wk low — adverse one-sigma path triggers DOWNTURN AND breaches the Jun 10 structural low simultaneously.
- **Trend:** **Price estimated BELOW 50DMA $76.39 (-3.3%) — bearish trigger from previous read FIRED.** 200DMA cushion now +8.5% (vs +20.4% Jun 22). The 50DMA gate that was the proximate bullish anchor is now a resistance ceiling. 200DMA $68.09 + 4-wk low $68.08 form the next major structural support, ~8% below spot.
- **Volatility & premium environment:** **VXN 32.37 (+16.99%) is the dominant tactical signal — bearish trigger FIRED.** Est. TQQQ IV ~97% (up from ~83% Jun 22 → ~14 pts of premium repricing overnight). EM widened to ±13.7%. **Premium is now extremely rich in absolute terms but the richness reflects priced-in disaster scenarios for PCE Jun 26.** The "premium is rich for a reason" caveat from Jun 23 has intensified — the reason is now louder. Crucially, VIX 18.95 (broad fear) is NOT confirming the Nasdaq vol spike, which creates two possible PCE-day paths: (a) benign PCE → fast VXN-crush back toward VIX (premium normalization), (b) hot PCE → VIX climbs to meet VXN (premium holds rich).
- **Put-selling context: HOSTILE (demoted from CAUTIOUS).** Demoted on: (a) **Regime demoted Stage 3 → 4** — Stage 4 historically not a put-selling environment in any backtested cycle (high tail-risk + accelerating vol regime); (b) **TQQQ broke 50DMA decisively** — proximate bullish anchor lost; (c) **VXN through 30 trigger fired with +16.99% session move** — vol-of-vol that is no longer informational but actively repricing; (d) **EM lower bound $63.8 now sits in structural-break territory** (below 4-wk low AND 200DMA simultaneously) — one-sigma adverse path is not "manageable drawdown" but "regime break"; (e) **PCE Jun 26 is 2 sessions out and binding** with both broader Nasdaq concentration breaking AND vol pricing in disaster — asymmetric risk on the print is severe; (f) **VIX-VXN divergence (13.4 pt spread) is unstable** and resolves either way in 5-10 sessions; (g) **Geopolitical +2 is single-point-of-failure** support to the entire bearish backdrop. **Net: HOSTILE — the regime has demoted to Stage 4, structural anchors are failing in sequence, PCE binding asymmetric risk inside the window. Context only — no strikes, sizes, expiries, or trade calls.**

## Forward Levels & Triggers
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 3 reclaim, multi-condition):** TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions AND VXN close below 28 AND VIX hold below 18 AND benign PCE Jun 26 (core PCE in-line/cool + dovish reaction).
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 5, multi-path):** TQQQ daily close below 200DMA $68.09 OR below 4-wk low $68.08 (concurrent breaks ~-8% from spot), OR VIX daily close above 22 (VIX closing the spread to VXN), OR VXN through 34 (52W high), OR hot PCE Jun 26 (core PCE > 3.0% YoY or hawkish reaction), OR Nasdaq Comp close at -7% from 52W high (~1.2% further down from current -5.9%), OR HY OAS through 300 bp, OR MOU walk-back / Trump tariff escalation.
- **Neutralizer:** Benign PCE Jun 26 + VXN crush back toward VIX (sub-28) + TQQQ 50DMA reclaim. The Stage-3 reclaim path requires explicit PCE-anchored confirmation, not just absence of further deterioration. **Conversely:** the bearish path requires no additional catalyst — Stage-5 can be reached on Stage-4 momentum alone if any one bearish trigger fires before PCE.

## This Period's Catalysts
- **Jun 24-25, 2026 (Tue-Wed):** Fed-speak window remains open (post-blackout); Micron (MU) earnings (likely week of Jun 22-26).
- **Jun 26, 2026 (Fri):** **PCE Inflation (May reading)** — **2 trading days from today; binding macro decider; in Stage 4, this is the regime bifurcation point.**
- **Jun 30, 2026 (Tue):** **Quarter-end rebalance** — outsized close-auction activity; ~4 trading days out. **Now inside the 5-session relevance window.**
- **Jul 3, 2026 (Fri):** NFP June payrolls — pre-July-4 close, ~7 trading days out.

## Expiry-Window Flag
- **Catalysts inside the next 5 trading days (Jun 24 today, Jun 25, Jun 26, Jun 29, Jun 30):** Fed-speak; MU earnings; **PCE Jun 26**; **quarter-end rebalance Jun 30** (now inside 5-session window).
- **Window: EVENT-WINDOW** — PCE binding; quarter-end inside window; event density elevated.

## Structural Calendar Flag (deterministic — always report)
- **Quad-witching:** Last was **Jun 19, 2026** (passed, 3 trading days ago). Next is **Sep 18, 2026** (~61 trading days out). Outside relevance window.
- **Quarter-end rebalance:** Next is **Jun 30, 2026**. Days-until: **~4 trading days from today.** **Inside the 5-session relevance window.** Expect outsized close-auction activity Jun 30 + month-end rebalancing drift Jun 25-30. In Stage-4 regime, quarter-end flows typically defensive (bond bid + position trimming on winners).
- **Net:** **Quarter-end Jun 30 is 4 sessions away.** Combined with PCE Jun 26, the Jun 26-30 path is structurally event-loaded under a Stage-4 regime. Intraday vol/volume structurally elevated through end-of-month. Quarter-end rebalancing in Stage-4 historically amplifies defensive rotation (mega-cap tech further trimmed, defensive sectors bid). Descriptive only — no trade calls.

## EVENT ALERT — Historical Playbook
- **PCE Inflation (May reading) — Jun 26, 2026 (Fri, 2 sessions out).** Historical anchors for PCE prints in Stage-4 regimes with VIX-VXN divergence + Nasdaq concentration breakdown:
  - **Aug 30, 2022 PCE** (core 4.6% YoY hot during early-2022 inflation scare + VIX ~25 + accelerating Nasdaq selloff): SPX -1.8% Aug 30, VIX +1.6 pt, NDX -2.2%, NDX continued lower for 5 sessions post-print, eventually retesting June 2022 lows by mid-September. **Closest stage-4-with-elevated-vol anchor.**
  - **Sep 30, 2022 PCE** (core 4.9% YoY hot during Q3-2022 capitulation regime + VIX ~32 + Nasdaq -30% YTD): SPX -1.5% Sep 30, VIX +0.4 pt, but mega-cap mean-reverted intraday after initial selloff (oversold bounce dynamic). Key learning: extreme oversold + hot PCE can create one-day relief on dealer rebalancing even within Stage-4 regimes.
  - **Apr 26, 2024 PCE** (core 2.8% hot vs 2.7% expected, sticky regime, VIX ~14): SPX morning -0.7%, recovered to +1.0% close, VIX -1.2 pt by Friday — but this was risk-on regime context, NOT comparable to current Stage-4.
  - **Feb 24, 2023 PCE** (core 4.7% YoY hot during Feb 2023 hawkish-Fed regime + VIX ~22 + breadth weakening): SPX -1.05% Feb 24, NDX -1.7%, VIX +1.1 pt, 3-session downtrend follow-through into next FOMC. **Second-closest comparable.**
- **Net alert:** Carrying short-put exposure on TQQQ through PCE Jun 26 in current Stage-4 vol-divergent regime means accepting:
  1. **Pre-PCE vol-bid is already heavily in flight on the Nasdaq surface** (VXN +16.99% Jun 23 = 3 sessions of pre-event positioning compressed into one). VIX has room to climb 3+ pts to meet VXN if PCE confirms.
  2. **Hot-PCE asymmetry in Stage-4 vol-elevated regime is severe:** Aug 2022 historical anchor = SPX -1.8% day-of, 5-session post-print downtrend, VIX +1.6 pt. Translated to TQQQ on 3× leverage in current vol regime: ~-5-6% day-of, 200DMA test by next Tuesday probable, VXN through 34 (52W high) triggers Stage-5 immediately.
  3. **In-line/cool PCE in Stage-4 regime is the LEAST-priced-in outcome and gives the largest asymmetric upside payoff to a put-seller** — historical anchor Sep 2022 + risk-on PCE relief examples = VIX-crush 1.5-2.5 pts overnight, VXN-crush 3-5 pts (the heavily-priced Nasdaq surface unwinds first), TQQQ +6-9% relief move probable. **However: relief is from oversold + heavily-hedged conditions; it is NOT regime reclaim to Stage 3.** A constructive PCE buys 2-3 sessions of relief, not durable reversal — quarter-end Jun 30 + NFP Jul 3 are the next gates.
  4. **Quarter-end Jun 30 enters the immediate post-PCE path.** Whatever direction PCE sets, quarter-end rebalancing flows 2 sessions later either amplify (hot-PCE → further mega-cap trimming) or fade (cool-PCE → modest rebalancing into defensives anyway).
  5. **Macro lens -2 + DXY at 52W high + yields persistent** means even a benign PCE doesn't unwind the broader headwind — it only postpones it to NFP Jul 3.
  6. **NDX historically moves ~1.4-1.6× SPX into PCE in Stage-4 regimes** (vol-amplification on 3× leveraged underlying = ~4.5-5× SPX move). TQQQ Jun 26 day-of move likely ±6-10% on either path.
- **Net historical path estimate for in-line/cool PCE in Stage-4 vol-elevated regime:** 2-3 sessions of oversold-bounce relief (TQQQ ~$73.9 → ~$78-80 region), VXN crush 3-5 pts, VIX crush 1.5-2.5 pts, Stage-3 reclaim attempt by week of Jun 30. **For hot PCE in Stage-4 vol-elevated regime:** Immediate Stage-5 entry, TQQQ tests 200DMA $68.09 and 4-wk low $68.08 within 2-3 sessions, VIX climbs through 22 to meet VXN, VXN through 34 (52W high), credit lens at risk of degrading further. **Asymmetry: hot-print downside is structural-break territory; cool-print upside is bounded by 50DMA $76.39 as resistance.** **Descriptive only — no trade calls.**

> - **VIX/VXN divergence (13.4 pt spread) explicitly flagged** as dominant tactical signal.

Scored mid-range pending headline confirmation.
